query_title: The Man Who Fell to Earth

recommendations.title: The Witches

recommendations.title: Don't Look Now
recommendations.overview: While grieving a terrible loss, a married couple meet two mysterious sisters, one of whom gives them a message sent from the afterlife.

recommendations.title: Performance
recommendations.overview: In underworld terms, Chas Devlin is a 'performer,' a gangster with a talent for violence and intimidation. Turner is a reclusive rock superstar. When Chas and Turner meet, their worlds collide—and the impact is both exotic and explosive.

recommendations.title: Walkabout

recommendations.title: Bad Timing
recommendations.overview: Alex Linden is a psychiatrist living in Vienna who meets Milena Flaherty though a mutual friend. Though Alex is quite a bit older than Milena, he's attracted to her young, carefree spirit. Despite the fact that Milena is already married, their friend

recommendations.title: Castaway
recommendations.overview: Middle-aged Gerald Kingsland advertises in a London paper for a female companion to spend a year with him on a desert island. The young Lucy Irving takes a chance on contacting him and after a couple of meetings they decide to go ahead. Once on the i

recommendations.title: Outlander
recommendations.overview: During the reign of the Vikings, a man from another world crash-lands on Earth, bringing with him an alien predator. The man must fuse his advanced technology with the weaponry of the vikings to fight the monster.

recommendations.title: Attack on Titan
recommendations.overview: As viable water is depleted on Earth, a mission is sent to Saturn's moon Titan to retrieve sustainable H2O reserves from its alien inhabitants. But just as the humans acquire the precious resource, they are attacked by Titan rebels, who don't trust t

recommendations.title: The Current War
recommendations.overview: Electricity titans Thomas Edison and George Westinghouse compete to create a sustainable system and market it to the American people.

recommendations.title: What Planet Are You From?
recommendations.overview: A human-looking alien from a highly advanced but emotionless all-male society is sent to Earth to impregnate a woman and bring the child back to their planet. The alien ends up falling in love while a suspicious FAA agent tails him.
